    Subclasses of Location in pl.put.poznan.buildinginfo.logic.Composite
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    Building
    Represents Building as a CompositeLocation from Composite Design Pattern Contains multiple Levels as a children
    class 
    Level
    Represents Level as a CompositeLocation from Composite Design Pattern Contains multiple Rooms as a children
    class 
    LocationComposite
    An abstract class for specific locations that contain children e.g.
    class 
    Room
    Represents a specific room in a building.
